Class LoaderSettings.Builder

java.lang.Object
dev.dejvokep.boostedyaml.settings.loader.LoaderSettings.Builder
Enclosing class:
LoaderSettings
public static class LoaderSettings.Builder extends Object
Builder for loader settings; wrapper for SnakeYAML Engine's LoadSettingsBuilder class which is more detailed, provides more options and possibilities, hides options which should not be configured.

  • Field Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description

    static final boolean

    If to automatically create a new file if absent by default.
    static final boolean
    DEFAULT_DETAILED_ERRORS
    If to print detailed error messages by default.

  • Method Details

    • setCreateFileIfAbsent

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setCreateFileIfAbsent(boolean createFileIfAbsent)
      Sets if to create a new file and save it if it does not exist automatically.

      Not effective if there is no file associated with the document.

      Default: DEFAULT_CREATE_FILE_IF_ABSENT

      Parameters:
      createFileIfAbsent - if to create a new file if absent
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setAutoUpdate

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setAutoUpdate(boolean autoUpdate)
      If enabled, automatically calls YamlDocument.update() after the document has been loaded.

      Not effective if there are no defaults associated with the document.

      Default: DEFAULT_AUTO_UPDATE

      Parameters:
      autoUpdate - if to automatically update after loading
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setErrorLabel

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setErrorLabel(@NotNull String label)
      Sets custom label for error messages.

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Default: defined by the parent method
      Parent method: LoadSettingsBuilder.setLabel(String)
      Parent method docs (v2.3): click

      Parameters:
      label - the label
      Returns:
      the builder

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setDetailedErrors(boolean detailedErrors)
      Sets if to print detailed error messages.

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Sets if to allow duplicate keys in sections (last key wins when loading).

    • setMaxCollectionAliases

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setMaxCollectionAliases(int maxCollectionAliases)
      Sets maximum aliases a collection can have to prevent memory leaks (see Billion laughs attack).

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Default: defined by the parent method
      Parent method: LoadSettingsBuilder.setMaxAliasesForCollections(int)
      Parent method docs (v2.3): click

      Parameters:
      maxCollectionAliases - maximum aliases for collections
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setTagConstructors

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setTagConstructors(@NotNull Map<org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.nodes.Tag, org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.api.ConstructNode> constructors)
      Sets custom node to Java object constructors, per YAML tag.

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Parameters:
      constructors - constructor map
      Returns:
      the builder

    • setSchema

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setSchema(@NotNull org.snakeyaml.engine.v2.schema.Schema schema)
      Sets custom schema to use. Schemas are used to resolve and determine object tags contained within a document.

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Default: defined by the parent method
      Parent method: LoadSettingsBuilder.setSchema(Schema)
      Parent method docs (v2.7): click
      Related YAML spec (v1.2.2): JSON schema tags, failsafe schema tags

      Parameters:
      schema - the schema to set
      Returns:
      the builder
      See Also:
      • LoadSettingsBuilder.setSchema(Schema)

      envConfig - the config to set
      Returns:
      the builder
      See Also:
      • LoadSettingsBuilder.setEnvConfig(Optional)

    • setCodePointLimit

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setCodePointLimit(int limit)
      Sets the limit on the code point length of the incoming document. Please note that this is not the actual size of the document in bytes - that depends on the used encoding. Should a document exceed the limit, an YamlEngineException will be thrown while loading the document.

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Default: defined by the parent method
      Parent method: LoadSettingsBuilder.setCodePointLimit(int)
      Parent method docs (v2.9): click
      Related YAML spec (v1.2.2): -

      Parameters:
      limit - the code point limit
      Returns:
      the builder
      See Also:
      • LoadSettingsBuilder.setCodePointLimit(int)

    • setBufferSize

      public LoaderSettings.Builder setBufferSize(int size)
      Sets the buffer size in bytes for passed input streams. Alternatively, make sure that the passed streams are already buffered, when this setting rarely has any impact.

      For additional information, please refer to documentation of the parent method listed below.

      Default: defined by the parent method
      Parent method: LoadSettingsBuilder.setBufferSize(Integer)
      Parent method docs (v2.9): click
      Related YAML spec (v1.2.2): -

      Parameters:
      size - the buffer size in bytes
      Returns:
      the builder

      public LoaderSettings build()
      Builds the settings.
